'''kajuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaboo|yaboo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaboo|yaboo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kajuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæjijith|kæjijith]] || [[word:kæjijij|kæjijij]] || [[word:kæjijish|kæjijish]] || [[word:kæjiji|kæjiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kajujujuth|kajujujuth]] || [[word:kajujujuj|kajujujuj]] || [[word:kajujujush|kajujujush]] || [[word:kajujuju|kajujuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kajujuth|kajujuth]] || [[word:kajujuj|kajujuj]] || [[word:kajujush|kajujush]] || [[word:kajuju|kajuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kajufjuth|kajufjuth]] || [[word:kajufjuj|kajufjuj]] || [[word:kajufjush|kajufjush]] || [[word:kajufjuf|kajufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kajujuthu|kajujuthu]] || [[word:kajujuju|kajujuju]] || [[word:kajujushu|kajujushu]] || [[word:kajujuku|kajujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kajujuth|kajujuth]] || [[word:kajujuj|kajujuj]] || [[word:kajujush|kajujush]] || [[word:kajuju|kajuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kajujuthul|kajujuthul]] || [[word:kajujujul|kajujujul]] || [[word:kajujushul|kajujushul]] || [[word:kajujukul|kajujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kajujuthuthu|kajujuthuthu]] || [[word:kajujujuju|kajujujuju]] || [[word:kajujushushu|kajujushushu]] || [[word:kajujuku|kajujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kajujuthun|kajujuthun]] || [[word:kajujujun|kajujujun]] || [[word:kajujushun|kajujushun]] || [[word:kajujukun|kajujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kajujuthuoro|kajujuthuoro]] || [[word:kajujujuoro|kajujujuoro]] || [[word:kajujushuoro|kajujushuoro]] || [[word:kajujukuoro|kajujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
